rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc And Motion To Vacate Renewal Of Judgment And Compel Execution And Service Of Acknowledgment Of Satisfaction Of Judgment
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, DECEMBER 11, 2007, LINE 2. DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER E. GRELL'S, IND., D.B.A. LAW OFFICE OF CHRISTO, Motion To Vacate Renewal Of Judgment And Compel Execution And Service Of Acknowledgment Of Satisfaction Of Judgment IS GRANTED. THE AMOUNT SOUGHT IS IN ERROR. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Mtoion And Motion For Relief From The Clekr'S Clerical Errors
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, DECEMBER 11, 2007, LINE 2. PLAINTIFF SUSAN BENEDETTO'S Motion For Relief From The CLERK'S Clerical Errors IS DENIED. THE RECORD REFLECTS THAT THERE WAS NO CLERICAL ERROR INVOLVED IN THE FAILURE TO FILE THE COST MEMORANDUM. THE PROOF OF SERVICE REFLECTS THAT THE ORIGINAL PLEADINGS WERE SENT TO THE WRONG ZIP CODE ADDRESS AND THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT THE PLEADINGS REACHED THE CLERKS. A NUNC PRO TUNC ORDER CANNOT DECLARE SOMETHING DONE THAT WAS NOT DONE. CITY OF LOS ANGELES V SUPERIOR COURT (1968) 264 CAL APP 2D 766, 771. THE TIME HAS PASSED TO SEEK RELIEF UNDER C.C.P. SECTION 473. THE COURT'S ORDER OF OCTOBER 28, 2004 TAXING COSTS SHALL BE VACATED BECAUSE THE MEMORANDUM OF COSTS WAS NEVER FILED. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES SCHWAB & CO VS. LARRY YU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Charles Schwab & Co., Inc.'S Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction As To Defendants Carly Fong And Larry Yu
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, DECEMBER 11, 2007, LINE 14. PLAINTIFF CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC.'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AS TO DEFENDANTS CARLY FONG AND LARRY YU: HEARING REQUIRED. PARTIES ARE TO ADDRESS THE EVIDENCE IN THE RECORD THAT SUPPORTS OR DOES NOT SUPPORT THE PROSPECT OF FUTURE DISCLOSURES APART FROM THE CHANG LITIGATION. HOW CAN SCHWAB CLAIM IRREPARABLE HARM WHEN IT PLACED IN EVIDENCE THE JUNE 16, 2005 LETTER AND THE FACTS RELATED THERETO? EXPLAIN WHY THE PREVIOUSLY FILED CONFLICT WAIVERS OF YU AND FONG APPLY/DO NOT APPLY TO MR. HANSEN. =(302/PJM)
